title: Thendral Vanthu Theendum Pothu Lyrics From Avatharam
stanzas:
Thendral vandhu
theendum podhu
enna vannamo manasula

Thingal vandhu
kaayum podhu
enna vannamo nenappula

vandhu vandhu
pogudhammaa
ennamellaam
vannam ammaaa

Unmaiyamma
ulladha naanum sonne
ponnammaa chinna
kannae..

yavarum sollamalae
pookkalum vaasam veesudhu.
uravum illaamalae
iru manam yaedho pesudhu.

evarum sollamale
kuyilellaam
thaenaa paadudhu.
edhuvum illaamalae
manasellaam
inippa inikkudhu

oda neeroda
indha alagam adhupola
odam adhu odum
indha kaalam adhu pola

nelayaa nillaadhu
ninaivil varum nerangalae
thendral vandhu
theendum podhu ..

eeram vilundhaale
nilathilae ellam thulirkkudhu
nesam porandhalae
odambellaam yeno silirkudhu

aalam viludhaaga
aasaigal oonjal aadudhu
alaiyum ala pole
azhagellaam kolam podudhu..

kuyile kuyiliname
andha isaiyaa koovudhammaa
kiliye kili inamae
adhu kadhayaai pesudhammaa

Thendral vandhu
theendum podhu
enna vannamo manasula
Thingal vandhu
kaayum podhu
enna vannamo nenappula

vandhu vandhu pogudhammaa
ennamellaam
vannam ammaaa
ennagalukaethapadi
vannamellaam
maarum ammaa

unmaiyile ulladhu
enna enna vannangal
enna enna..
thendral vandhu..

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses feelings of longing and the beauty of nature, reflecting on how emotions change with the seasons.

In which movie is this song featured?

This song is featured in the movie Avatharam.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song is sung by the legendary Ilaiyaraaja and S. Janaki.

What year was this song released?

This song was released in 1995.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Thendral Vanthu Theendum Pothu, the lyrics beautifully convey a sense of yearning and connection to nature, encapsulating the emotions of the characters in Avatharam. The soothing melody, composed by Ilaiyaraaja, paired with S. Janaki's heartfelt rendition, evokes a deep sense of nostalgia. This song serves as a poignant reminder of the transient nature of feelings and seasons. Its timeless appeal continues to resonate with audiences, making it a cherished classic.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Thendral Vanthu Theendum Pothu is a timeless melody that captures the essence of longing and nostalgia. With Avatharam as its backdrop, this song showcases the enchanting collaboration of Ilaiyaraaja's masterful composition and S. Janaki's soulful vocals. Experience the emotional depth of this classic that resonates with listeners even today.
stanzaMeanings: When the breeze comes, what color does it bring to my heart?
When the moon comes, what color does it bring to my thoughts?
It keeps coming and going, everything feels like a color, mother.
As it is for us, everything will change, mother.
What is true is within me, I told you, my little one..
Without anyone saying anything, the flowers bloom. Without any connections, the heart speaks something.
Without anyone saying anything, the cuckoo sings sweetly. Without anything, the heart feels sweet now.
Like the water flows, this beauty flows too, just like that time flows.
The paddy doesn't stay, the moments that come in thoughts, when the breeze comes, what color does it bring..
When the tears fall, everything blooms on the earth, love is born, and the body feels a certain joy.
When the world wakes up, desires swing like a swing, beauty flows like waves..
Oh cuckoo, is that music calling? Oh parrot, is that story speaking?
Is it a story or a revelation? It is love, after all.
When the breeze comes, what color does it bring to my heart? When the moon comes, what color does it bring to my thoughts?
It keeps coming and going, everything feels like a color, mother. As it is for us, everything will change, mother.
What is true is within me, what are my dreams, what are they.. the breeze comes..
